prompt:
A compact one-axis solar tracking unit installed outdoors, built around a small panel and weatherproof 200 Wh power setup. The system should show stepper-driven motion hardware, pivot frame, controller enclosure, and clear east-west tracking geometry, making it obvious this is an active tracking assembly rather than a fixed solar mount. The design should feel practical and maker-built but polished.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future renewable-energy aesthetic: soft natural light, realistic aluminum, fasteners, sealed electronics, and outdoor textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the tracking unit centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as a dynamic solar hardware item.
